name: Spinach Gratin Ala Bc
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach in microwave for 2 minutes on high; drain and squeeze out excess water.
2. Place butter and garlic in a gratin dish; microwave on high for 30 seconds.
3. Add drained spinach to the gratin dish.
4. Sprinkle with cayenne pepper and walnuts.
5. Mix shredded cheese and bread crumbs, then top the mixture onto the spinach.
6. Heat under broiler until the cheese is melted and slightly browned.
